是<Color=red>曾经的鼓隆族<Color=white>居住的地方。

<unk[3:0:11]>Whoa, hey! Who are you, guy?<unk[5:0]> Me? I'm
not doing nothin'.

<unk[3:0:4]>Well...if you're wondering, Gorondia<Color=red> <Color=white>is the
legendary place where the <Color=red>Gorons of old<Color=white>
used to live.
I heard there's an amazing treasure
stored there too. They had even more
advanced technology than we do now!
And I heard they used to ride in
<Color=red>strange vehicles<Color=white>.

<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:18 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83]>I wanted to use this <Color=red>mine cart<Color=white> to search

to budge.
<unk[3:0:2]>Anyway, you better not tell anyone all my
secrets, OK?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:265]><unk[4:0:26 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 65 110 103 114 121]>……啊，大哥哥。

<unk[3:0:2]>所以在乘上矿车之前，

<unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 48]>对了，我的矿车

<unk[3:0:265]><unk[4:0:26 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 65 110 103 114 121]>……那個，大哥哥。

就連我都知道礦車
如果不在軌道上是無法行駛的咕隆！
<unk[3:0:2]>希望在我坐上礦車之前

<unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 48]>啊，我的礦車是

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:265]><unk[4:0:26 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 65 110 103 114 121]>Wait. <unk[5:0]>A. <unk[5:0]>Sec. <unk[5:0]>Guy!


Everyone knows that a cart won't move
unless it's on some tracks.

<unk[3:0:2]>Can you please put it on the tracks before
I get on board?

<unk[3:0:4]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 83 95 48 48]>My cart is the one with the <Color=red>cushion <Color=white>on it.


<unk[3:0:0]>I don't want any bruises on my behind, so
make sure you've got the right one.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:10]><unk[4:0:8 83 105 103 104]>好险咕咯，
